name: Vegetable Consomme
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Leeks, white part only, diced
1/2 small Celery root (or 2 celery stalks), peeled and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a stockpot.
2. Cover with 2 quarts cold water and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to a light simmer and cook for about 20 minutes.
4. Turn off the heat, keep covered, and set aside to infuse for 20 more minutes.
5. Strain the broth carefully through a fine strainer.
Serving size: 1 cup (19 cal; .2 g fat; 0 mg chol; 10.6 mg sod)
